creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Free @beautypie creams to try in @libertylondon for the whole of May, from their no-coffee coffee bar, to celebrate Beauty Pie’s first permanent outpost inside Liberty! So you can finally see all the products, smell them and swatch them, and the space is so nice! Go and check them out ✨

📍 Central Atrium, Liberty London, Regent St., Carnaby, London, W1B 5AH
🗓️ No-coffee bar open until 31st May

geo_locations: Central Atrium, Liberty London, Regent St., Carnaby, London, W1B 5AH
pinned_places: Central Atrium, Liberty London, Regent St., Carnaby, London, W1B 5AH

transcription.text: There's a brand new no coffee coffee bar in the middle of Liberty where instead of caffeine they'll be pouring the best face and body creams into espresso sized takeaway cups for free. It's all thanks to Beauty Pie who are celebrating their first permanent outpost in Liberty. So you'll finally get to touch, smell and swatch all your favorite Beauty Pie products. As a big Beauty Pie fan this is so nice. Make sure you go and check them out and share this with someone who would love to go.
